all.en: Our sales commission plan rewards both effort and measurable outcomes.
all.zh: 我們的業務佣金辦法獎勵努力與可衡量的成果。

all.en: The plan year aligns with our fiscal year starting in February.
all.zh: 計畫年度與我們自二月開始的會計年度一致。

all.en: Each account executive receives an individual annual quota target.
all.zh: 每位客戶經理皆獲得個人年度配額目標。

all.en: Quota is divided evenly across four quarterly performance periods.
all.zh: 配額平均分配於四個季度績效期間。

all.en: Base salary covers fifty percent of the total target compensation.
all.zh: 底薪佔目標總薪酬的百分之五十。

all.en: Variable commission covers the remaining fifty percent at quota.
all.zh: 達標時，變動佣金佔剩餘的百分之五十。

all.en: Commission accelerators apply once a rep exceeds one hundred percent.
all.zh: 業務員超越百分之百後可適用加速佣金。

all.en: Above one hundred percent, commission rates double for new business.
all.zh: 達成超過百分之百後，新業務佣金率加倍。

all.en: Renewal business is paid at a lower base rate of two percent.
all.zh: 續約業務以較低的百分之二基本佣金率支付。

all.en: New logo deals carry a higher rate of eight percent of contract value.
all.zh: 新客戶案件佣金率較高，為合約金額的百分之八。

all.en: Multi year contracts include a one time bonus on year one value.
all.zh: 多年合約包含對第一年金額的一次性獎金。

all.en: Strategic accounts receive additional spiff bonuses upon closing.
all.zh: 策略客戶於結案時可獲得額外的特別獎金。

all.en: Spiffs are announced quarterly to focus team attention.
all.zh: 特別獎金每季公告，以引導團隊聚焦。

all.en: Commission payments are processed monthly following deal closure.
all.zh: 佣金於案件結案後每月發放。

all.en: Payments require fully executed contracts and finance approval.
all.zh: 發放需有完整簽署的合約與財務核准。

all.en: Clawback provisions apply if customers cancel within ninety days.
all.zh: 若客戶於九十天內取消，將適用佣金追回條款。

all.en: Reps may earn presidents club recognition for exceptional performance.
all.zh: 業務員可因卓越表現獲得總裁俱樂部表揚。

all.en: Qualification requires achieving one hundred twenty percent of annual quota.
all.zh: 資格要求為達成年度配額的百分之一百二十。

all.en: Winners enjoy an all expenses paid trip with their guest.
all.zh: 得獎者可享有偕同賓客的全額招待旅程。

all.en: Plan changes are communicated at the start of each fiscal year.
all.zh: 計畫變更於每個會計年度開始時公告。

all.en: Disputes are reviewed by the sales operations and finance committee.
all.zh: 爭議由業務營運與財務委員會審核。

all.en: The plan is documented in detail in the official commission handbook.
all.zh: 完整辦法詳細記載於官方佣金手冊中。

all.en: Reps must sign acknowledgment before participating in the plan.
all.zh: 業務員需於參與計畫前簽署確認書。

all.en: Our goal is to motivate top performance while rewarding teamwork.
all.zh: 我們的目標是激勵卓越表現並獎勵團隊合作。
